name: lovable-import-module
description: Import stage for the Lovable.dev SEO/GEO rebuild pipeline. Resolves a Lovable or GitHub URL, fetches the source tarball, and detects whether it's a Lovable project.

scripts.import: tsx -e "import('./src/index.ts').then(m => m.importFromUrl(process.argv[1]).then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2))).catch(e => { console.error(e.message); console.error(e.cause); process.exit(1); }))" --
